output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?club WHERE {
  ?person rdfs:label "Andoni Goikoetxea" @en .
  ?person p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 ?club .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
  ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) <= 1980 && YEAR(?end) >= 1980)
}
output.result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| club     |
| -------- |
| wd:Q8687 |

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?club WHERE {
  ?person rdfs:label "Andoni Goikoetxea" @en .
  ?person p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 ?club .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
  ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) <= 1980 && YEAR(?end) >= 1980)
}
```
